instructions.instruction: Use this skill when **you have received review feedback** on your own Rails code (PR comments, pair review, async review). This is the counterpart to **code-review**, which covers *giving* a review.
instructions.original_snippets: Use this skill when **you have received review feedback** on your own Rails code (PR comments, pair review, async review). This is the counterpart to **code-review**, which covers *giving* a review.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger respond-to-review.

instructions.instruction: **Core principle:** Verify before implementing. Technical acknowledgment over performative agreement. Re-review after significant changes.
instructions.original_snippets: **Core principle:** Verify before implementing. Technical acknowledgment over performative agreement. Re-review after significant changes.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger respond-to-review.

instructions.instruction: **Never:** Push back without technical evidence. If unsure, verify before claiming it's fine.
